Usage: gokart add <integration> ... [flags]

Add integrations to a managed structured project.

Arguments:
  <integration> ...    Integration: sqlite, postgres, ai, or redis.

Flags:
  -h, --help                 Show context-sensitive help.
      --version              Print version information and quit.

      --dry-run              Preview changes without writing files.
      --force                Overwrite user-modified files.
      --json                 Print machine-readable JSON result.
      --verify               Run go test ./... after adding.
      --verify-timeout=5m    Maximum verification time.
